vocab.meaning: sự hoài nghi của người tiêu dùng
vocab.example: Despite my initial consumer skepticism regarding shoe quality, the pair I ordered online exceeded all expectations.

vocab.meaning: trải nghiệm lướt web/ứng dụng mượt mà
vocab.example: The e-commerce app offers such seamless navigation that I often find myself browsing for footwear during my lunch break.
The lack of standardized sizing across different brands is the main reason I occasionally hesitate to buy boots online.

vocab.meaning: cửa hàng vật lý truyền thống
vocab.example: I still visit bricks-and-mortar stores to try on specific models before hunting for a better deal on the web.

vocab.meaning: thu nhập khả dụng (tiền dư dả để chi tiêu cá nhân)
vocab.example: Having a bit of discretionary income allows me to indulge in limited-edition sneakers from international websites.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác hối hận sau khi mua hàng
vocab.example: I experienced a minor case of buyer's remorse when the loafers arrived and the color was slightly different from the thumbnail.
I always cross-reference reviews to ensure I am purchasing from a reputable vendor to avoid any potential scams.

vocab.meaning: mua sắm ngẫu hứng (không kế hoạch)
vocab.example: That pair of running shoes was a total impulse buy, triggered by a targeted advertisement on my social media feed.

vocab.meaning: chính sách đổi trả dễ dàng, không phiền hà
vocab.example: I only shop on platforms that guarantee a hassle-free return policy in case the fit isn't quite right.

vocab.meaning: thông tin vận chuyển/kê khai hàng hóa
vocab.example: I meticulously track the shipping manifesto to know exactly when my package will clear customs and arrive at my door.
